texto: A witch is someone who has dedicated her life to learning about the connections between things. She studies the different cycles and her place in them. She learns how to use the energy in herself and in the world to make changes. And most of all, she tries to make the world a better place for herself and other people.
explicacao: Citação de Isobel Bird sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “A witch is someone who has dedicated her life to learning about the connections between things.
